headline: Enphase Energy Targets Commercial Growth With New U.S. Microinverters And Credits
summary: Enphase Energy (NasdaqGM:ENPH) has launched U.S.-manufactured commercial microinverters designed for three-phase grids. The products use GaN technology and are intended for commercial solar installations rather than the company’s traditional residential focus. By manufacturing in the U.S., these microinverters may qualify for domestic content bonus tax credits and certain federal infrastructure projects. Enphase Energy, known primarily for residential solar microinverters and energy...
